PipelineRunTriggeredData.description: `data` payload of a run trigger — the Batch job was submitted.

invocation_id.description: Unique identifier of this run — joins run history rows and real-time status messages.
invocation_id.title: Invocation Id

job_id.description: AWS Batch job ID of the submitted run.
job_id.title: Job Id

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline the run was triggered for.
pipeline_id.title: Pipeline Id

PipelineRunTriggeredData.title: PipelineRunTriggeredData

description: PUBLIC JSON Schema contract for the SUCCESS response body of the Data Sync API POST /pipelines/{pipeline_id}/run — the canonical `{success, message?, data}` envelope where `data` is the submitted run (job_id, job_name, pipeline_id, invocation_id), always present on a successful trigger. Error responses use the canonical error envelope and are documented in the Data Sync OpenAPI rather than here. Absent optional fields are omitted from the wire, never null. Served at schemas.<domain> for external API-key consumers. Source of truth: k2m.models.pipelines.data_sync_api.PipelineRunResponse.

data.description: The submitted run — always present on a successful trigger.

success.description: Always true on this 2xx body. Error responses use the canonical `{success: false, message, ...}` error envelope.
success.title: Success

title: Analitiq Data Sync API — Pipeline Run Response
